messages.text:
BL-618 — Stable boot prefix over cap on main: 53408 chars > 51200 gate — prompt_engine_test_runner red, slim articles back under 50KB
What it solves: E2E QA procedure: run bb swarmforge/scripts/test/prompt_engine_test_runner.bb
on the fix commit — expect "ALL PASS" and a printed stable-prefix chars
value under 51200 with headroom; spot-check that a sampled moved passage
is findable under constitution/articles/reference/ and that its slim
article…
Approval context: Sign-off wanted on the APPROACH only: trim the boot-inlined constitution articles back under the 51200-char gate by moving elaboration prose into reference/ files (the established BL-433 split mechanism), never by raising the cap. Which specific passages move is the implementing parcel's call, gate…
BL-618 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-618" (or "reject BL-618 <reason>") to act.
